view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of accessing logging information, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The prior steps focus on customer sign-ups and bookings but do not include any validations related to access logging or the expected results of the persona scenario. This indicates a lack of necessary evidence to assess the requirement satisfactorily.
